database_info.name: IP Camera Selection Theory - Standards Based
database_info.purpose: Engineering design tool for IP camera selection

1_series_selection.principle: Camera series determines feature level, AI capability, and build quality

series.features: AcuSense AI, Smart Hybrid Light, WDR 120dB, audio/alarm I/O
series.ai: AcuSense: human/vehicle classification, line crossing, intrusion

series.features: Deep learning, face recognition, people counting, ANPR
series.ai: DeepinView: on-camera face capture, people counting, behavior analysis
series.best_for: Retail analytics, perimeter, face recognition, city surveillance

2_resolution_selection.principle: Resolution must meet pixel density requirements at target distance

tiers.best_for: Standard commercial, parking, retail — BEST VALUE
Good balance of detail and bandwidth
Wide area coverage, forensic detail, critical areas

3_light_technology_selection.principle: Night illumination technology determines image quality in darkness

comparison.best_for: Color evidence, license plate color, clothing identification
Best of both — covert + color evidence when needed
Latest generation with improved AI-driven light switching

3_light_technology_selection.recommendation: For most commercial installations: Smart Hybrid Light (LI) provides the best balance. For pure evidence quality: ColorVu (L). For covert: Standard IR (I).

4_form_factor_and_lens.principle: Form factor and lens must match the scene geometry

form_factors.ir_advantage: Longer IR range due to form factor

5_poe_and_network.principle: All IP cameras use PoE for power and data on single Cat5e/Cat6 cable
5_poe_and_network.cable: Cat5e minimum, Cat6 recommended. Max 100m per run.
5_poe_and_network.switch_sizing: Total PoE budget must exceed sum of all camera power + 20% margin

6_acusense_features.principle: AcuSense cameras (2-series) classify humans and vehicles to reduce false alarms by 90%+

features.description: AI distinguishes people and cars from animals, leaves, shadows
Trigger only when person or vehicle crosses a defined line
Alert only when person or vehicle enters a defined zone
Search NVR recordings by target type for fast forensic review
Hik-Connect app alerts only for classified targets

6_acusense_features.when_to_use: Any installation where false alarms from animals, trees, shadows, or headlights are a concern — which is most outdoor installations.

7_audio_alarm_integration.principle: Audio and alarm I/O enable two-way communication and peripheral integration
7_audio_alarm_integration.models_with_audio_alarm: Models with suffix S, IS, IZS, LIZS typically include built-in mic + speaker + alarm I/O

capabilities.built_in_mic: Captures ambient audio (check local recording consent laws)
capabilities.built_in_speaker: Enables remote voice warnings, two-way audio
capabilities.alarm_input: Connect external sensors (PIR, door contact, panic button)
capabilities.alarm_output: Trigger external devices (siren, light, lock relay)
capabilities.active_deterrence: SL suffix = strobe light + speaker for automated warnings

8_storage_and_codec.principle: H.265+ compression halves storage vs H.264 with same quality

H.265+.note: Smart codec, up to 75% reduction vs H.264

8_storage_and_codec.sd_card: Most IP cameras support on-board microSD (up to 256GB) for edge recording / NVR failure backup

9_nvr_compatibility.principle: NVR must support camera resolution and features

guide.min_nvr: K1 or higher (not Q1 for some models)

guide.note: Check NVR max resolution per channel
Non-AcuSense NVR will record but not use AI features

10_compliance.principle: IP cameras must meet safety, EMC, cybersecurity, and privacy standards

standards.scope: Camera placement, signage, data retention policies
HTTPS, 802.1x, digest auth, SFTP, IP filtering — enable all on commissioning
